Finished eating. Dissolution is the absolute erasure from the world and memory

It happens slowly or quickly depending on your gnostic level. It can happen to anything and everything, no matter how mundane or divine. Once that erasure happens your memory will correct yourself

So Mythag left london to fetch the keeper from russia
Tohuwabohu left a shard in this world, and it landed in russia, causing the tunguska explosion
Yakut/Yakutsk is 雅库特 (yǎ kù tè), Acushnet is 阿库特 (ā kù tè, the CN term they used in game)
